---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the public repo, docs, examples, or future open-source tooling
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or Opportunity

What would you like to improve?

## Proposed Idea

Describe the idea clearly.

## Why It Matters

Explain the benefit for users, contributors, or the product direction.

## Scope

If relevant, say whether this is about:

- Documentation
- Examples
- Public tooling
- Policies
- Roadmap direction

## Additional Context

Add references, mockups, or examples if helpful.
